predeclared_experiment.carrier: CAT_CAS-owned user-space page-permission state over synthetic pages
predeclared_experiment.source_operator: neutral, forward, reverse, or shuffle mprotect permission flips outside the measured window
predeclared_experiment.sentinel: fixed owned-page read sequence with no intentional page fault
predeclared_experiment.observable: page_permission_group PMU cache counters and sentinel duration
predeclared_experiment.killing_control: neutral versus shuffle page-permission control spread
predeclared_experiment.restoration_class: all owned pages restored to PROT_READ|PROT_WRITE, deterministic probe succeeds, and buffer digest remains unchanged

claim_ceiling: Owned page-permission-state timing/PMU discriminator only; no memory disclosure, isolation bypass, path memory, coherence holonomy, OrbitState coupling, fold-odd recovery, target coupling, or Small Wall crossing claim
frontier_update: The owned page-permission-state carrier is negative under this sentinel. Do not rerun this neutral/forward/reverse/shuffle page-permission sequence unchanged.
